overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town. The character moves from an open dock area with tall ships through market stalls and covered alleyways into a bustling town square. Bright sunlight illuminates the timber-framed buildings and cobblestone streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor dock with moored sailing ships

events.description: group of armored guards passes close to camera on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the harbor area toward the town center

notable_agents.action: group of armored guards with polearms walking past the camera
shirtless dock worker walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: large sailing vessel with multiple masts and rigging docked at the harbor
multi-story medieval building with exposed wooden beams and steep roof
stacks of wooden barrels and crates lining the dockside
uneven cobblestone paving covering the harbor walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, open harbor area with a large masted ship visible to the left. The character walks along cobblestone streets past timber-framed buildings, encountering guards and dock workers. The sky is fully visible and the lighting is direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden market stairs with canvas stalls

events.description: ascends wooden stairs from cobblestone dock to elevated market platform

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs through a bustling market area with stalls on both sides

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a wooden stall with hanging goods
shirtless man running up the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with railings leading upward to market level
wooden stall with canvas awning displaying various goods
elevated wooden walkway structure connecting the docks to the town

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden stairs from the harbor into a market area with canvas stalls. The environment transitions from open cobblestone to elevated wooden platforms. Various NPCs populate the market, including a vendor and a running dock worker.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with overhead canopy

events.description: enters covered walkway with canvas canopy overhead, significantly reducing direct sunlight
transitions from wooden walkway to narrow stone alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered path beside the water, passing various townspeople and vendors

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking toward the camera along the waterfront
man leaning against the stone wall observing the street

entered.detail: canvas and wooden overhead covering providing shade over the walkway
rough stone wall of the waterfront buildings with weathered texture
wooden fence railing along the water edge separating the path from the harbor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered waterfront walkway shaded by a canvas canopy. The lighting becomes significantly darker and more diffused. The path runs alongside a stone wall with the harbor visible through a wooden railing, populated by various pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley opening into town square

events.description: exits covered walkway into more open alley with visible wooden cart and increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded alleyway, passing a wooden cart and approaching a busy town square

notable_agents.action: man pushing a wooden cart loaded with barrels along the street
woman in green dress walking alongside the character

entered.detail: wooden pushcart with large wheels carrying barrels and goods
large stone building with tall arched windows visible in the distance
construction scaffolding against the side of a building

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a busier cobblestone alley opening toward a town square. A wooden cart pushed by an NPC occupies the right side of the path, while stone and timber buildings line both sides. The lighting returns to direct sunlight as the canopy ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open harbor into the shaded corridors of a bustling medieval town. It begins on sun-drenched cobblestone streets beside a large masted ship, moving past timber-framed buildings and dock workers under a clear sky. As the character ascends wooden stairs, the environment shifts from the open harbor to an elevated market area filled with canvas stalls and active vendors. The scene then transitions into a covered waterfront walkway, where the lighting becomes dark and diffused beneath a canvas canopy that shields the path from the sun. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade back into direct sunlight, passing a wooden cart in a narrow alley that opens toward a busy town square.
